elements.title: Supabase | The Postgres Development Platform
elements.h1: Build in a weekendScale to millions
elements.hero_subheadline: Supabase is the Postgres development platform. Start your project with a Postgres database, Authentication, instant APIs, Edge Functions, Realtime subscriptions, Storage, and Vector embeddings.
h2s: Trusted by the world's most innovative companies.
Stay productive and manage your app without leaving the dashboard
Build in a weekend, scale to millions
